docs.title: Embedded Systems Portfolio
docs.text:
Hi, I'm Emmanuel Nhial, welcome to my embedded systems logging portfolio:

This website documents my weekly progress during my embedded systems training.

docs.title: What you'll find here
docs.text:
• My weekly build logs
  • Projects and experiments
  • Problems I solved
  • Lessons learned

➡Go to the Build Log section to see my progress.

docs.title: The Material Team
docs.text: A small group of people dedicated to making writing documentation easy, if not outright fun! Here are some of the things we have blogged about:

docs.title: Happy new years eve!
docs.text:
We hope you are all having fun and wish you all the best for the new year!
